rulings.Case Title: WAYNE HARTMAN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1, Defendant Bayer Cropscience Inc.¿s motion to compel response to discovery is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion Of Defendant Mccord Corporation To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2, Defendant McCord Corp.¿s motion to compel further responses and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH GARZA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 3, Plaintiffs¿ motion for assignment of rights and restraining order is granted in part and with a significant limitation. Defendant must assign all its rights in any bank accounts of whatever description it has in any and all of the financial institutions listed on exhibit B in favor and for the benefit of the plaintiffs. The assignment does not extend to the contents of safe deposit boxes and does not include defendant¿s subsidiaries or any other separately incorporated or organized entities. The significant limitation is that this is an assignment only that operates only on the defendant and does not permit or contemplate the service of any levies on the financial institutions themselves. Plaintiffs have withdrawn their request for a restraining order. = (220/HEK)
